meaning: adj.鐥旂殑,鐩磋偁鍙婅倹闂ㄧ殑
examples: The anti-hemorrhoidal ointment Preparation H can reduce gout-induced skin swelling temporarily.
Objective To investigate the effectiveness of emergency laser operation(ELO) for acute hemorrhoidal disease.
Objective To evaluate the safety and efficacy for rectal mucosal prolapse using a hemorrhoidal circular stapler device.
